backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data models (expenses, travel entries, travellers, payments) and persistent maps for a carpool ledger app with access control, user profiles, and app data storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: fixing the 'Mark all travellers for today' checkbox to use IST instead of UTC, and auditing all frontend `new Date()` usages to apply the IST UTC+5:30 offset.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and recent IST-related changes across the carpool ledger frontend.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS entry point for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication, profile setup, and auto-toll logic using IST date via `getTodayIST()` to correctly add toll expenses on weekdays.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky app header with branding, optional sync status indicator, and a user dropdown menu with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Authentication gate that renders a login card for unauthenticated users and passes children through for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Reusable empty state UI component displaying an icon or illustration, title, description, and optional action button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to enter their name, with validation, loading state, and prevention of dismissal without saving.
frontend/src/components/ResponsiveTableS: A wrapper component that renders children inside a horizontally scrollable area with a rounded border, useful for making tables responsive on small screens.
frontend/src/components/SyncStatusIndica: Displays a small icon and text indicating the current sync status (syncing, synced, or failed), including a relative time since last sync.
frontend/src/features/ledger/BackupResto: A settings panel that allows users to export ledger data to a JSON backup file or restore from one, with a confirmation dialog when unsaved draft changes exist.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CarExpenses: A panel for adding and viewing car expenses (CNG, petrol, toll, etc.) filtered by date range, with support for auto-toll settings and multi-category expense entry.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CashPayment: A dialog form component for recording a cash payment for a specific traveller, capturing amount, date, and an optional note.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ClearDataPa: A password-protected settings panel that lets users selectively or fully clear ledger data categories (trips, payments, car expenses, etc.) with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/features/ledger/CoTraveller: A dialog for adding or editing a co-traveller income entry, capturing amount, date, trip time (morning/evening), and an optional note.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DailyPartic: Renders a grid for tracking morning/evening trip participation per traveller per day, with bulk toggle controls, weekend inclusion switches, and save/save-and-next actions.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DateRangePi: A date range picker component with start and end date popovers that supports both controlled props and ledger context state.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteCarEx: Confirmation alert dialog for deleting a car expense entry, showing the amount and category before calling the delete callback and showing a toast.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteCashP: Confirmation alert dialog for deleting a cash payment, displaying the traveller name and amount before invoking the delete callback with a success toast.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteOther: Confirmation alert dialog for deleting an other-pending amount entry, calling removeOtherPending from ledger context on confirm and showing a success toast.
frontend/src/features/ledger/DeleteTripH: Confirmation alert dialog for deleting a trip history entry, showing the traveller name and date with context-appropriate messaging for traveller vs co-traveller types.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditCarExpe: Dialog form for editing an existing car expense record, with fields for category, amount, date, and optional note, including amount validation.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditCashPay: Dialog form for editing an existing cash payment entry with amount, date, and optional note fields, pre-populated from the provided payment object.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditOtherPe: A dialog component for editing an existing 'other pending' amount entry, pre-filling fields for amount, date, and comment, and saving updates via the ledger state context.
frontend/src/features/ledger/EditTripHis: A dialog component for editing a traveller's trip history entry, allowing updates to the date and morning/evening session checkboxes, then calling an onSave callback with the updated entry.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExpenseHist: A simple dialog wrapper that renders the ExpenseHistoryView component inside a modal with a title and description.
Displays a filterable, sortable table of car expense records within the selected date range, with inline edit and delete actions backed by the ledger state context.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExportButto: A button component that opens the ExportReportDialog when clicked, providing a simple entry point for report exports.
frontend/src/features/ledger/ExportRepor: A dialog for configuring and triggering report exports (CSV or PDF), with options for report type, date range, section inclusion, traveller filtering, and expense/payment filters.
The main ledger page component that orchestrates all ledger tabs (daily grid, summary, expenses, trip history, etc.), manages per-tab date ranges, unsaved-changes guards, and opens various feature dialogs.
frontend/src/features/ledger/LedgerState: Defines a React context and provider that exposes the full ledger state and all mutation methods (from useLedgerLocalState) to child components, along with a useLedgerState hook for consuming the context.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MobileLedge: Renders a mobile slide-out Sheet navigation menu listing all ledger tabs and action items (Payment History, Expense History, Export), closing the sheet on selection.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MonthYearRa: Provides two Select dropdowns for choosing a month and year, classifying the current date range to derive display values and emitting full-month or full-year ranges on change.
frontend/src/features/ledger/MultiCatego: A dialog form that allows adding three preset car expenses (Toll, CNG BRD, CNG AHM) simultaneously, validating amounts and saving them via the ledger state context.
frontend/src/features/ledger/OtherPendin: A button-triggered dialog form for recording a pending amount (with date and optional note) for a specific traveller, submitting via a provided onSubmit callback.
frontend/src/features/ledger/OverallSumm: Displays a financial overview card showing total income, total car expenses, and profit/loss for the selected date range, along with a monthly breakdown table.
frontend/src/features/ledger/PaymentHist: A thin dialog wrapper that renders the PaymentHistoryView component inside a modal for viewing cash payments within the selected date range.
Displays a filterable, sortable table of cash payment history with options to filter by traveller and date range, and supports editing and deleting individual payments via dialogs.
frontend/src/features/ledger/PaymentSumm: Renders a card summarizing per-traveller charges, payments received, and outstanding balances within the selected date range, including co-traveller income totals.
frontend/src/features/ledger/RatePerTrip: A controlled input component that allows the user to view and update the per-trip rate, syncing with ledger state and validating numeric input.
frontend/src/features/ledger/SummaryPane: Shows a per-traveller summary card with weekday/weekend trip counts, total charges, payments, and balance, and includes forms for recording cash payments and other pending amounts.
frontend/src/features/ledger/TravellerMa: Provides a UI to add, rename, and remove travellers from the carpool ledger, blocking deletion if a traveller has an outstanding balance.
frontend/src/features/ledger/TripHistory: Displays a detailed trip history table for all travellers and co-travellers within the date range, with support for editing and deleting trip entries and other pending amounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppDataSync.ts: Custom hook that syncs local ledger state with a remote ICP backend actor, polling every 3 seconds, debouncing outbound saves, and merging remote/local states on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoTollSettings.t: Custom hook that manages auto-toll settings (enabled flag, amount, last date) persisted in localStorage, with IST-aware date helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity/status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLedgerLocalState.t: Large hook managing the full carpool ledger state (travellers, daily trip data, payments, expenses, etc.) with localStorage persistence, merge support, and a revision counter.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark theme CSS custom properties using an OKLCH-based warm neutral palette, plus base table and zebra-stripe styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Utility functions that compute monthly income/expense reports, profit-and-loss statements, and income/expense breakdowns from ledger data.
frontend/src/utils/backupRestore.ts: Provides functions to export, import, validate, and merge carpool ledger state as JSON backup files, including file download/upload handling and state merging logic.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for date range operations including IST-aware today calculation, month/week/year range helpers, weekday filtering, and date range classification.
frontend/src/utils/exportExcel.ts: Exports ledger data to a CSV file with two sections: a daily AM/PM participation grid and a per-traveller summary with trip counts, charges, payments, and balances.
frontend/src/utils/exportPdf.ts: Generates HTML-based PDF reports for the carpool ledger, routing to different report types (monthly, profit/loss, income, expense, or standard) based on provided filters.
frontend/src/utils/exportReport.ts: Orchestrates CSV and PDF export of ledger reports with configurable filters for report type, traveller selection, daily grid, summary, payments, and car expenses.
frontend/src/utils/ledgerBalances.ts: Calculates a traveller's balance within a date range by summing trip charges, cash payments, and optional other pending amounts from the ledger state.
frontend/src/utils/money.ts: Provides currency formatting and parsing utilities for Indian Rupees (INR) using the en-IN locale.
frontend/src/utils/tripCalculations.ts: Provides functions to calculate total and monthly income from daily trip data within a date range, incorporating co-traveller incomes and weekend inclusion logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/weekendInclusion.ts: Provides helpers to determine if a date is a weekend day and whether it should be included in UI display or income calculations, with special handling for dates that have saved trip data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Carpool Ledger project state, documenting existing features, a known IST timezone bug on the Daily Page checkbox, and pending fix requests to apply UTC+5:30 offsets throughout the frontend.
